UNITED STATES SECURITIES AND EXCHANGE COMMISSION

FORM 10-Q

For the quarterly period ended September 30, 2024

Alphabet Inc.

Commission File Number 001-37580

PART I

Item 1. Financial Statements

Three Months Ended Sep 30, 2024Three Months Ended Sep 30, 2023
Revenues$88,268$76,693
Net income$26,301$19,689

Item 2. Management's Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations

Revenue growth in Google Services was driven primarily by strong performance in Search and YouTube ads. We continue to invest in artificial intelligence across our product portfolio.

Operating margins remained stable as we balanced investment in Cloud and AI infrastructure with cost discipline.
